description_long: This is a tall, ornate candle set in a decorative, dark metal candlestick holder. The holder features intricate detailing along its slender, columnar shaft, which is segmented with various ornamental bands and fluted sections. The base is wide and sturdy, with three elaborately carved feet that provide stability and a touch of classical elegance. At the top, a shallow, round dish supports a single, short candle with a visible wick, but no flame. The overall appearance suggests a vintage or antique style, suitable for formal or historical urban settings such as plazas, parks, or near monuments. The dark, metallic finish gives it a robust and weather-resistant look, ideal for outdoor use.
description: A tall, ornate candle in a decorative dark metal candlestick holder with a wide, carved base and a single short candle on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, ornate shaft, and three-footed base of the candlestick with the candle centered on top.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the dish and the detailed carving on the base and shaft.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetry of the base and the slender, segmented shaft leading up to the candle.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the profile of the candlestick and the shallow dish supporting the candle.
